# sonarqube_alm_github (Data Source)

Use this data source to get a GitHub ALM definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sonarqube_alm_github" "example" {
  key = "my-github-key"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Unique key of the GitHub instance setting.

### Read-Only

- `app_id` (String) GitHub App ID.
- `client_id` (String) GitHub App Client ID.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `url` (String) GitHub API URL.
